title: Ars Blatium
description: A small mod for compatibility Blatium and Ars Nouveau
body:
This mod seamlessly integrates Blatium with Ars Nouveau, introducing a suite of magical enhancements that expand both gameplay and customization options.
The mod adds new magic armor, spellbooks, and a couple of new spells.


![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YW41lgGi/images/d838b3ae2a9c9f0c1b1df06afd9acaec036dcde2_350.webp)
